tasks.description: Database migration and model updates for opencode_password column
steps: Verify migration 005 doesn't already exist in schema/migrations/
Create schema/migrations/005_add_opencode_password.sql with: ALTER TABLE minions ADD COLUMN opencode_password TEXT NULL;
Add OpencodePassword string field to Minion struct in orchestrator/internal/db/minions.go
Implement StorePassword(ctx, id, password) error method
Implement ClearPassword(ctx, id) error method

Update all 8 query methods to SELECT and Scan opencode_password: GetByID, FindRecentDuplicate, List, ListByStatuses, ListPending, ListIdleRunning, ListClarificationTimeouts, GetByClarificationMessageID
Run unit test: create minion, store password, retrieve minion, verify password field populated
Verify migration applies cleanly to local postgres container

tasks.description: Locate callback handler method for password cleanup integration
steps: Search for callback handling in orchestrator/internal/api/ directory
Identify exact method name and file location that handles minion completion callbacks
Document method signature and terminal status handling logic
Verify method handles completed, failed, and terminated statuses
Document findings for use in orchestrator-cleanup-1 task

tasks.description: Update SSEConnector interface signature to support password authentication
steps: Locate SSEConnector interface definition in orchestrator/internal/spawner/spawner.go (around line 53-57)
Change Connect signature from Connect(ctx, minionID, podName) to Connect(ctx, minionID, podName, password string)
Update streaming.SSEClient to implement new interface signature
Update processMinion() in spawner.go to pass empty string to Connect() initially (password added later in spawner-1)
Verify interface contract satisfied by SSEClient implementation

tasks.description: Fix SSE endpoint path bug and add authentication support
steps: Change orchestrator/internal/streaming/sse.go:190 from /events to /event (singular)
Define connection struct before SSEClient type: type connection struct { cancel context.CancelFunc; password string; podName string }
Change SSEClient.connections from map[uuid.UUID]context.CancelFunc to map[uuid.UUID]*connection
Update Connect() method to accept password parameter and store in connections map
Update connectWithRetry() to accept and pass password parameter
Update streamEvents() to accept password parameter
Import encoding/base64 in sse.go
Add HTTP Basic Auth header in streamEvents() after line 202: req.Header.Set(Authorization, Basic + base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString([]byte(opencode: + password)))
Update Disconnect() method to work with new connection struct type
Update httpClient in NewSSEClient() with Transport: &http.Transport{MaxIdleConns: 100, MaxConnsPerHost: 50, MaxIdleConnsPerHost: 50}
Add unit test for HTTP Basic Auth header generation with special characters in password
Verify existing SSE retry logic still works with password auth

tasks.description: Generate and store per-minion UUID passwords before pod spawn
steps: Import github.com/google/uuid in spawner.go if not already imported
Update MinionUpdater interface in spawner/spawner.go to add: StorePassword(ctx context.Context, id uuid.UUID, password string) error
Modify orchestrator/internal/spawner/spawner.go processMinion() before line 185
Add idempotent password check: if m.OpencodePassword is empty, generate uuid.New().String(), else reuse existing
Call s.minionUpdater.StorePassword(ctx, m.ID, password) BEFORE spawning pod
If StorePassword fails, log error and mark minion as failed (don't continue spawn)
Add OpencodePassword string field to SpawnParams struct in orchestrator/internal/k8s/pods.go:91-99
Pass password to SpawnParams: OpencodePassword: password
Update sseClient.Connect() call to pass password: Connect(ctx, m.ID, podName, password)
Verify orchestrator crash between generate and spawn reuses existing password from DB

tasks.description: Orchestrator reconnects to active minions on restart
steps: Add reconnection logic in orchestrator/cmd/orchestrator/main.go after reconciliation (around line 156)
Query: minions := minionStore.ListByStatuses(ctx, []db.MinionStatus{StatusRunning, StatusPending})
Filter minions with nil pointer check: if m.OpencodePassword != empty string AND m.PodName != nil AND *m.PodName != empty string
For each matching minion: retrieve password from m.OpencodePassword (read from DB, not connections map)
Call sseClient.Connect(ctx, m.ID, *m.PodName, m.OpencodePassword) with password from DB
Log reconnection attempt: 'Reconnecting to minion' with minion_id and pod_name
If Connect fails, log warning but continue (don't fail startup)
Manual E2E: Kill orchestrator pod, verify reconnection to active minions
Manual E2E: Restart orchestrator mid-task, verify events continue streaming in control panel
Verify if reconnection fails, minion continues executing (observability loss acceptable)

tasks.description: Disconnect SSE streams and clear passwords when minions reach terminal states
steps: Locate callback handler method using findings from research-1 task
Before ClearPassword(), call sseClient.Disconnect(minionID) to close SSE connection
Add ClearPassword() call in callback handler when status is completed/failed
Add sseClient.Disconnect() and ClearPassword() in orchestrator/internal/watchdog/watchdog.go when marking minion as failed
Add ClearPassword() for terminated status (kubectl delete pod scenario)
Log password cleanup: 'Cleared opencode password' with minion_id
Verify cleanup is idempotent (calling twice doesn't error)
Manual E2E: Verify password cleared from database after minion completion
Manual E2E: Verify password cleared on terminated status (kubectl delete pod)
Verify password cleared on both successful completion and failure scenarios

tasks.description: OpenCode server listens on all interfaces with password validation
steps: Update devbox/entrypoint.sh line 80: change --hostname 127.0.0.1 to --hostname 0.0.0.0
Add OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD to validate_env() required vars (line 41-54) with pattern: [[ -z ${OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD:-} ]] && missing+=(OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD)
Test password validation: verify entrypoint exits with error if OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD is empty string
Update orchestrator/internal/k8s/pods.go buildEnvVars() to pass OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD env var: {Name: OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD, Value: params.OpencodePassword}
Verify params.OpencodePassword is accessible in buildEnvVars from SpawnParams
Build devbox Docker image successfully
Curl test: curl -H 'Authorization: Basic $(echo -n "opencode:$PASSWORD" | base64)' http://<pod-ip>:4096/event returns 200 and SSE stream
Curl test: curl http://<pod-ip>:4096/event without auth returns 401

tasks.description: Create SSE proxy API route for minion event streaming
steps: Check Next.js version and Node version in control-panel/package.json to determine if ws package needed
Run npm install ws in control-panel directory (or skip if Node 20+ with native WebSocket)
Create control-panel/src/app/api/minions/[id]/events/stream/route.ts (note: events in path)
API route connects to orchestrator WebSocket server-side: ws://orchestrator.minions.svc.cluster.local:8080/api/minions/{id}/stream

Transform WebSocket messages to SSE format: event: <type>
data: <json>
Send heartbeat comments every 30s: : heartbeat\n\n
Handle browser disconnect via req.signal.addEventListener('abort') to close upstream WebSocket

On WebSocket error, emit: event: error
data: {error: upstream connection failed}
Set response headers: Content-Type: text/event-stream, Cache-Control: no-cache no-transform, Connection: keep-alive, X-Accel-Buffering: no
Verify WebSocket connection closes when browser disconnects (no connection leak)

tasks.description: Replace WebSocket with EventSource in frontend hook
steps: Modify control-panel/src/hooks/use-minion-events.ts lines 134-261
Replace WebSocket with EventSource API
Remove fetchWSConfig() function and dependency
Remove WebSocket reconnection logic (INITIAL_BACKOFF_MS, MAX_BACKOFF_MS constants)
Use same-origin URL: /api/minions/${minionId}/events/stream (matches control-panel-1 route path)
Implement eventSource.onmessage handler for event parsing
Implement eventSource.onerror handler that logs but doesn't retry (SSE auto-retries)
Implement eventSource.onopen handler
Cleanup via eventSource.close()
Delete control-panel/src/app/api/ws-config/route.ts after removing all references
Test EventSource connection with browser DevTools to verify SSE format
Verify browser console shows no WebSocket-related errors
Verify control panel handles malformed SSE messages gracefully

tasks.description: Build images and run comprehensive E2E validation
steps: Go unit tests pass for new password methods (StorePassword, ClearPassword)
Unit test: SSEClient HTTP Basic Auth with special characters in password
TypeScript compiles without errors
Control panel npm run build succeeds
Docker build orchestrator image successfully
Docker build devbox image successfully
Docker build control-panel image successfully
Manual E2E: Spawn minion, verify password in DB with SELECT query
Manual E2E: Verify control panel shows events in real-time
Manual E2E: Verify SSE auth header in orchestrator logs (base64-encoded)
Manual E2E: Kill orchestrator pod, verify reconnection to active minions
Manual E2E: Restart orchestrator mid-task, verify events continue streaming in control panel
Manual E2E: Verify password cleared after minion completion (completed status)
Manual E2E: Verify password cleared on failure (failed status)
Manual E2E: Verify password cleared on terminated status (kubectl delete pod)
Manual E2E: Spawn minion with wrong password env var, verify 401 in orchestrator logs (not connection refused)
Manual E2E: Test concurrent spawn with password reuse (idempotency)
Verify orchestrator logs show 'SSE connection established' for each minion
Verify all OpenCode authentication warnings eliminated from logs
Add password state machine diagram to orchestrator/AGENTS.md or root AGENTS.md
Document SSE connection troubleshooting: 401 (auth failure) vs connection refused (binding issue)
Add orchestrator restart behavior notes: reconnects to active minions with passwords from DB
Document control panel SSE proxy architecture in control-panel README
Add deployment notes: in-flight minions lose observability during redeploy (acceptable blast radius)
Document password lifecycle in code comments at key locations (spawner, cleanup, reconnection)

patterns: Password Storage: orchestrator/internal/db/minions.go - Store transient credentials during execution, clear on completion
Secret Management: infra/deployments.yaml:91-100 - Per-pod dynamic secrets passed as plain env.value
SSE Streaming: orchestrator/internal/streaming/sse.go - Long-lived connection with retry/backoff logic
Control Panel API Proxy: control-panel/src/app/api/minions/[id]/events/route.ts - Server-side proxy to avoid CORS/DNS issues
nonGoals: NetworkPolicy-only security (rejected - defense in depth requires auth)
Shared static password (rejected - per-pod passwords limit blast radius)
Keep WebSocket with ingress (rejected - adds infrastructure complexity and security risk)
Polling instead of streaming (rejected - poor UX and 5s latency)
criticalIssues: SSEConnector interface requires password parameter - signature mismatch must be fixed first
Reconnection logic must read password from DB (not connections map - map is empty after restart)
Control panel route path must match frontend: /api/minions/[id]/events/stream
PodName is *string (nullable pointer) - must check nil before dereferencing
SSE disconnect must be called before password cleanup to avoid connection leaks
